name: create_text_to_speech
description: Convert text to natural-sounding speech audio. Supports multiple voices (alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer) and two quality tiers (tts-1 for low latency, tts-1-hd for higher quality). Returns audio data in the specified format. Maximum input length is 4096 characters.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: TTS model to use: 'tts-1' (optimized for speed) or 'tts-1-hd' (optimized for quality).

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: The text to generate audio for (max 4096 characters).

body.input: Welcome to our platform. We're glad to have you here. Let me walk you through the key features of your new account.

response_example.body: (binary audio data in the requested format - save to file with appropriate extension)
